name: Entry/Exit Signal Generator
description: Daily (5:30 PM ET, Mon-Fri): Detects RSI extremes, MACD crossovers, volume breakouts. Creates alerts for actionable signals.

parameters.query: WITH latest AS (SELECT ticker,indicator_name,value,signal FROM technical_indicators WHERE indicator_date=CURRENT_DATE),pivoted AS (SELECT ticker,MAX(CASE WHEN indicator_name='RSI_14' THEN value END) as rsi,MAX(CASE WHEN indicator_name='RSI_14' THEN signal END) as rsi_sig,MAX(CASE WHEN indicator_name='MACD' THEN signal END) as macd_sig,MAX(CASE WHEN indicator_name='TREND' THEN signal END) as trend_sig,MAX(CASE WHEN indicator_name='VOL_SMA_20' THEN signal END) as vol_sig FROM latest GROUP BY ticker) SELECT p.*,t.company_name FROM pivoted p JOIN tickers t ON p.ticker=t.ticker WHERE p.rsi_sig='oversold' OR (p.macd_sig='bullish' AND p.trend_sig='bullish') OR p.rsi_sig='overbought'
